description: Fix all 63 TypeScript compilation errors across the codebase. These are in API routes (contacts/bulk, custom-fields, forms, invoices, leads, notification-prefs, orders, quotes, whatsapp, ai, automations, superadmin modules/tenants/errors) and lib/api/deprecation.ts. Must achieve zero TypeScript errors with npx tsc --noEmit.
steps: Fix app/api/tenant/contacts/bulk/route.ts - property access via index signature (use ['prop'] instead of .prop), type narrowing for unknown values, and SQL overload issues
Fix app/api/tenant/custom-fields/route.ts - remove reference to undefined 'safeType', fix Drizzle insert type mismatch
Fix app/api/tenant/forms/route.ts - fix undefined 'settings' variable reference
Fix app/api/tenant/invoices/route.ts - convert number args to string for decimal fields, fix undefined 'title'
Fix app/api/tenant/leads/[id]/route.ts - fix undefined 'body' variable references (likely needs const body = await request.json())
Fix app/api/tenant/notification-prefs/route.ts - use bracket notation for index signature properties
Fix app/api/tenant/orders/route.ts - convert number to string for decimal fields
Fix app/api/tenant/quotes/route.ts - fix 'unitPrice' -> 'unit_price' property name, convert numbers to strings for decimal fields
Fix app/api/tenant/whatsapp/send/route.ts - use bracket notation for index signature properties
Fix app/api/tenant/ai/route.ts - add null/undefined checks for string|undefined args (use ?? '' or non-null assertions with validation)
Fix app/api/tenant/automations/[id]/route.ts - add 'trigger_type' to the Zod schema or access correctly
Fix app/api/tenant/contacts/[id]/route.ts - fix Drizzle overload mismatch
Fix app/api/superadmin/modules/route.ts - fix wrong number of arguments
Fix app/api/superadmin/tenants/[id]/modules/route.ts - fix wrong number of arguments
Fix app/api/superadmin/tenants/route.ts - property 'id' does not exist on update body type
Fix app/api/user/profile/route.ts - add null checks for v.first_name/v.last_name
Fix lib/api/deprecation.ts - type 'response' as NextResponse instead of unknown
Run npx tsc --noEmit and confirm 0 errors
acceptance_criteria: npm run build succeeds without TypeScript errors
verification: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep 'error TS' | wc -l should output 0
